stimulus.content: Different types of maps are designed for different purposes. A physical map shows natural features. A political map shows borders and capitals. A thematic map focuses on a specific topic like climate or population.

stem: Which TWO tasks would require a student to use a political map?

choices.text: Finding the capital city of a country
Locating the border between two nations
Measuring the height of a mountain range
Comparing annual rainfall across a region

answer_explanation: Political maps show human-made features like country borders and capital cities. Mountain heights require a physical map, and rainfall data requires a thematic map.
